An LLC, or Limited Liability Company, is simply a legal business structure. 

In Florida, it allows you to operate a business while separating your personal assets from your business liabilities.

That separation is one of the biggest advantages. Your business activity stays separate from your personal activity.

To form a Florida LLC, you file through the Division of Corporations within the Department of State.

If you are thinking about starting a business and want to structure it correctly, feel free to reach out at (305) 819-3675. https://www.instagram.com/reel/DU0-bxgD55J/
